reviews.review_description: Not worth the money
love it

reviews.review_title: Easy to play and amazing game
reviews.review_description: The rhythm gets you going. Amazing game impressive imersion
Really cool rhythm game, using only your head-movements. :-) After the 3rd scene I was smiling nonstop... :-) :-) :-)
Could not install on Samsung Gear VR.
really great use of VR, waiting for some new levels and maybe an infinite runner style mode :D

developer_response.body:
Sure, we will add more levels and content in the next versions.

Thanks for your comments, enjoy.

reviews.review_description: This makes me dizzy but its so mich fun
I have a Samsung galaxy s7 edge with 5gb of reserve memory. I should be able to experience this.
The music is catchy

reviews.review_title: I danced like an idiot and I enjoyed it
reviews.review_description: Aweome mechanics and good musical choices. So guys, how does it feel to grasp the legacy of Dance Dance Revolition and guitar hero ? Exactly like this !  The nodding addition is a wonderful idea ! But the interface seems very cheap, I dont like the feeling of that playing bar it feels too much linear and slippery rather than something responsive and organig. And the side thrusterd looks weird. Bud overall this game is really great. Just nees more polish and you re good to go guys ! Thanks for brithening my Vr life so much.

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your comments, we have modified the propeller on both sides as you suggested, and we will continue to work in this direction and thank you again! Hope you can enjoy~Cheers!

reviews.review_description:
Doesn’t recognize clicks with controller. Please fix.
Trigger click and touch pad click don’t work. 

Link to video:
https://www.dropbox.com/s/hpwsayz2b4pjkoa/com.MirrorKey.ElectroBeats-20180506-194735.mp4?dl=0

developer_response.body:
We have solved the input problem as soon as possible~
Also we are very sorry for that，the updates will be applied soon.

reviews.review_description: Very fun app with good music.
It is simple, yet fun to do. Great way to interact and keeps you on your toes.

In this rhythm and music game, you have to move using your head to the beat and music.  Think guitar hero on steroids.  However, jumping over neon lines can be challenging and if you're not careful you could get whiplash.  If you want the best rhythm and music game possible I highly suggest you get Smash the Beats for the Oculus Go.  It is just like Beat Saber, only 1/4th the cost, with one controller instead of two.  If you play it standing up, I guarantee you will get a great cardio workout.  I plan on losing weight with this one.  Electro beats is fun, but smash the beats is fantastic!
Perfect game really amazing

Opens the game fine. But my control pad I guess doesn't connect. I can look around and highlight songs and play, but I can't select anything while in the game. I was really looking forward to playing this game too.

Update,
I have tried uninstalling and re installing, I have tried selecting the game from the phone and with the controller off put my phone in the vr and then turned the controller on. Still nothing. If it helps I am using a Samsung galaxy note 8 and I am using the oculus gear vr from samsung

Is no one going to get back to me on this issue? It's been weeks now

developer_response.body: Could you please try to restart the game without the controller connecting ?

reviews.review_description: It hot the phone very fast , even if this game don't have a really good graphics, it's a simple game but I don't know why it hot to much the phone.

developer_response.body:
Which phone? We haven't see any overheated on S6 or S7, there must be some reasons for your situation.Please give us a feedback if you see this response. Anyway thanks for your comments.

Update: (4-13 2017)
Also we have tested again about the phone overheated, it lasted for about an hour before it was overheated, please give us a reply for your situation, thanks!

reviews.review_description: Great music too

Its a good game but im kinda bummed the leaderboards was my main reason for buying it but it only ranks top15 and one song i almost got 1/3 of the score needed to crack top 15 lol ill never make it on LB for a single song so they use the "global leaderboard" term VERY loose lol should say top15 leaderboards lol but i cant knock it down for that as dumb as i think that is
Fun to play and it will give your neck a really good stretch 😉.
